title: `Eytam #5862
definition:
Etam = "lair of wild beasts"

 1) a village of the tribe of Simeon
 2) a town in Judah fortified and garrisoned by king Rehoboam of Judah
    and located between Bethlehem and Tekoa
 3) a cliff; site uncertain
nasbUsage:
